concepts.notes: Formal petition/instance (often administrative, especially CH usage).

Editorial addition from German lemma expansion. Modeled around the broad 'sensitive / easily affected' sense for people, skin, devices, materials, or topics; not split into a separate emotional-only concept. CEFR set editorially to B1 on 2026-03-21.

Editorial addition from the plural request `Leistungen`, normalized to the noun lemma `Leistung`. This concept covers the performance/achievement sense only; the administrative/services/benefits sense remains intentionally separate to avoid semantic overlap.

Editorial split for the remaining Spitze family. This branch models Spitze only in the textile sense of lace. It stays separate from the physical tip sense, from top-position uses, and from colloquial spitze = great.

Editorial split for the remaining Spitze family. This branch models Spitze as the leading or highest position in a ranking or structure. It stays separate from the physical tip sense, from lace, and from the colloquial evaluative use.

Editorial split for the remaining Spitze family. This branch models spitz only in the figurative sense of biting, pointed, or hurtful remarks and tone. It stays separate from the physical pointed-shape sense.

Editorial addition from German lemma expansion. Modeled around the broad unsettling or creepy sense for places, stories, sounds, or situations; not split into a separate gore-only or stronger terrifying branch. CEFR set editorially to B1 on 2026-04-17.

MT-C5 pilot: dangling in all three languages (Ablehnung / rejection / rifiuto). Level B1: abstract noun, and the adjacency rule flagged the A2 draft against its mutual antonym die Zusage (B2) - the flag was right.
MT-C5 pilot: dangling synonym of normalerweise (A2).
MT-C5 pilot: dangling antonym of beachten (A2).
MT-C5 pilot: dangling synonym of schliesslich (B1).

lexemes.notes: covers the 'for the rest / otherwise' sense of ansonsten; the primary Italian equivalent for 'otherwise' is 'altrimenti'
keinesfalls is formal/written; assolutamente no is more emphatic/spoken - closer formal equivalents: 'in nessun caso', 'per nessun motivo'
Shared with mindestens (A2) - covers the concessive sense but also quantitative; approximate for zumindest grading.
More emphatic/concessive variant; mirrors perlomeno register.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Used to show that something is the last in a series of events or actions.
Verwendet, um den letzten Punkt einer Reihe von Ereignissen oder Handlungen anzugeben.
Usato per indicare il punto finale in una serie di eventi o azioni.
Marks a guaranteed minimum.
Markiert ein sicheres Minimum.
Indica un minimo garantito.
Used to correct or refine a previous statement.
Wort für Korrektur oder Präzisierung einer Aussage.
Usato per correggere o precisare una frase precedente.
Introduces the consequence when a condition is not met.
Leitet die Folge ein, falls eine Bedingung nicht erfüllt ist.
Introduce la conseguenza quando una condizione non si realizza.
At the same time or during the time in question.
Zur gleichen Zeit oder während der besagten Zeit.
Nello stesso momento o durante il tempo in questione.
Shows contrast despite what was said before.

Indica contrasto rispetto a cio che ci si aspetta.
A concrete need for something required.
konkreter Anforderungsbedarf an ein Produkt oder eine Dienstleistung
esigenza concreta per un bene o un servizio necessario

Praktisch und gut begründet; hat einen klaren Nutzen.

Che ha grande valore o grande importanza.
Having no practical or real value.
Hat keinen brauchbaren Wert.
Che non ha utilita o importanza reale.

Richiesta formale rivolta a un'autorita.
A formal written request.
Jemanden gegen seinen Willen dazu bringen, etwas zu tun.
To make someone do something against their will.
Spingere qualcuno a fare qualcosa contro la sua volontà.
Sich auf jemanden oder etwas verlassen.
To rely on someone or something.
Fare affidamento su qualcuno o qualcosa.
Ein passender Moment oder eine günstige Möglichkeit, etwas zu tun.
Un momento adatto o una possibilità favorevole per fare qualcosa.
A suitable moment or favorable possibility to do something.
Eine schwierige Aufgabe oder Situation, die Einsatz verlangt.
Un compito o una situazione difficile che richiede impegno.
A difficult task or situation that requires effort.
Die Verbindung zwischen mehreren Informationen oder Ereignissen.
La relazione tra più informazioni o eventi.
The link between several pieces of information or events.
Die Art und Weise, wie man planmäßig etwas macht.
Il modo in cui si affronta qualcosa in modo pianificato.
The way in which something is handled in a planned manner.
Eine Bedingung, die erfüllt sein muss, damit etwas möglich ist.
Una condizione che deve essere soddisfatta perché qualcosa sia possibile.
A condition that must be met for something to be possible.
Das Bild oder Gefühl, das bei jemandem oder etwas entsteht.
L'idea o la sensazione che nasce da una persona o da una situazione.
The idea or feeling created by a person or situation.
Die Pflicht, für Entscheidungen oder Folgen einzustehen.
Il dovere di rispondere delle decisioni o delle conseguenze.
The duty to answer for decisions or consequences.
Eine offizielle Mitteilung, dass man mit etwas unzufrieden ist.
Una comunicazione ufficiale con cui si esprime insoddisfazione.
An official message expressing dissatisfaction.
Eine Folge oder ein Effekt, den etwas verursacht.
il risultato di un'azione o evento
the consequence caused by something
Eine Absprache, der mehrere Personen zustimmen.
Un'intesa approvata da più persone.
An arrangement accepted by several people.
Etwas nach bestimmten Kriterien beurteilen.
Giudicare qualcosa secondo determinati criteri.
To judge something according to certain criteria.
Informationen, Wissen oder einen Eindruck weitergeben.
Comunicare o far passare informazioni, conoscenze o impressioni.
To pass on information, knowledge, or an impression.
Neu auftreten oder sich entwickeln.
Comparire o svilupparsi da nuovo.
To appear or develop newly.
Dafür sorgen, dass etwas nicht passiert.
Fare in modo che qualcosa non accada.
To make sure that something does not happen.
Etwas positiv unterstützen oder weiterentwickeln.
Sostenere qualcosa in modo positivo o contribuirne allo sviluppo.
To support something positively or help it develop.
Jemanden durch gute Gründe dazu bringen, etwas zu glauben oder zu tun.
Portare qualcuno a credere o a fare qualcosa grazie a buone ragioni.
To make someone believe or do something through good reasons.
Etwas als wahr sagen, ohne es sofort zu beweisen.
Dire che qualcosa è vero senza provarlo subito.
To say that something is true without proving it immediately.
Etwas klar erkennen oder offiziell bestätigen.
Riconoscere chiaramente o stabilire ufficialmente qualcosa.
To recognize clearly or determine something officially.
Etwas in die Planung oder Entscheidung mit einbeziehen.
Includere qualcosa nella pianificazione o nella decisione.
To include something in planning or decision-making.
Sich mit einem Thema oder Problem gezielt beschäftigen.
Occuparsi in modo mirato di un tema o di un problema.
To address a topic or problem deliberately.

Comunicare in anticipo che qualcosa accadrà presto.
To communicate in advance that something will happen soon.

To complete something by adding information or parts.
Etwas oder jemanden nicht akzeptieren.
Non accettare qualcosa o qualcuno.

Etwas planmäßig ausführen oder organisieren.
Realizzare o organizzare qualcosa secondo un piano.
To execute or organize something according to a plan.
Eine Idee oder einen Plan praktisch verwirklichen.
Realizzare concretamente un'idea o un piano.
To put an idea or plan into practice.
So wichtig, dass es das Ergebnis oder die weitere Entwicklung stark beeinflusst.
Così importante da influenzare fortemente il risultato o lo sviluppo successivo.
So important that it strongly influences the result or what happens next.
Dafür zuständig oder verpflichtet, für etwas einzustehen.
Incaricato o tenuto a rispondere di qualcosa.
In charge of something or expected to answer for it.
Sehr positiv beeindruckt und voller Freude oder Interesse.
Molto colpito positivamente e pieno di gioia o interesse.
Very positively impressed and full of interest or excitement.
Mit klarem Verständnis oder absichtlich wahrgenommen und entschieden.
Percepito o deciso in modo intenzionale e con piena comprensione.
Perceived or decided deliberately and with clear understanding.
Nicht besonders hoch oder niedrig, sondern im mittleren Bereich.
Né particolarmente alto né basso, ma nella fascia centrale.
Neither especially high nor low, but in the middle range.
Nicht von anderen Personen, Meinungen oder Bedingungen abhängig.
Non dipendente da altre persone, opinioni o condizioni.
Not dependent on other people, opinions, or conditions.
Fähig, sich leicht an neue Situationen oder Anforderungen anzupassen.
Capace di adattarsi facilmente a nuove situazioni o richieste.
Able to adapt easily to new situations or requirements.
Sehr groß oder inhaltlich breit und detailliert.
Molto grande oppure ricco e dettagliato nei contenuti.
Very large or broad and detailed in content.
Für einen bestimmten Zweck passend oder gut brauchbar.
Conveniente o utile per uno scopo specifico.
Right or useful for a specific purpose.
Passend, vernünftig und der Situation entsprechend.
Adatto, ragionevole e coerente con la situazione.
Suitable, reasonable, and fitting for the situation.
Wahrscheinlich, aber nicht völlig sicher.
Con alta probabilità, ma senza certezza completa.
With high likelihood, but not with complete certainty.
Auf gar keinen Fall oder unter keinen Umständen.
In nessun caso o in nessuna circostanza.
Not at all.
Nicht vollständig, sondern nur zu einem Teil.
Non completamente, ma solo in parte.
Not completely, but only to some extent.
Als logische Folge von etwas, also deshalb.
Come conseguenza logica di qualcosa, quindi.
As a logical result of something.
Im Gegensatz dazu oder als Gegenargument.
In opposizione a ciò oppure come argomento contrario.
In opposition to that or as a counterargument.
Zusätzlich zu dem, was schon genannt wurde.
In aggiunta a ciò che è già stato detto.
In addition to what has already been mentioned.
In vielen Ländern oder auf der ganzen Welt.
In molti paesi o in tutto il pianeta.
Throughout the globe
Zum größten Teil oder hauptsächlich.
Per la maggior parte o principalmente.
For the greater part or mainly.
Über einen langen Zeitraum hinweg gedacht oder geplant.
Pensato o pianificato per un periodo prolungato.
Planned or considered over a long period.
Zur selben Zeit oder parallel zu etwas anderem.
Nello stesso momento o in parallelo a qualcos'altro.
At the same time or in parallel with something else.
Reagiert schnell oder stark auf Berührung, Kritik, Hitze, Licht oder andere Einflüsse.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Kann sich auf Personen, Haut, Geräte, Materialien oder Themen beziehen.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Che reagisce facilmente o con forza a contatto, critiche, calore, luce o altri stimoli.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Può riferirsi a persone, pelle, dispositivi, materiali o temi.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Quick to react strongly to touch, criticism, heat, light, or other influences.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Can describe people, skin, devices, materials, or topics.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Das, was jemand oder etwas in Arbeit, Schule, Sport oder Technik erreicht oder zeigt.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Gemeint ist die gezeigte Qualität oder das erreichte Niveau, nicht der Verwaltungs- oder Versicherungssinn von Leistungen.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Cio che una persona o un sistema riesce a fare o mostrare nel lavoro, nello studio, nello sport o sul piano tecnico.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Qui indica il rendimento o il livello mostrato, non il senso amministrativo di servizi o benefici.

concept_definitions.short_definition: What a person or system achieves or demonstrates in work, study, sport, or technical output.
concept_definitions.usage_note: This covers shown level or achieved output, not the administrative sense of services or benefits.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Ein feines, dekoratives Gewebe mit durchbrochenem Muster, das oft an Kleidung oder Stoffen verwendet wird.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Hier nur der Stoff- oder Textilsinn, nicht die Spitze eines Gegenstands und nicht die führende Position.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Un tessuto decorativo leggero e traforato, usato spesso per vestiti o altri capi.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Qui solo il senso tessile e decorativo, non altri significati della stessa parola tedesca.

concept_definitions.short_definition: A delicate decorative fabric with an open pattern, often used on clothes or textiles.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Only the textile or decorative-fabric sense is modeled here.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Die höchste oder führende Position in einer Rangordnung, Gruppe oder Entwicklung.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Hier geht es um die führende oder oberste Stellung, nicht um die Spitze eines Gegenstands und nicht um Stoff.

concept_definitions.short_definition: La posizione piu alta o di guida in una classifica, in un gruppo o in una struttura.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Qui indica la posizione di testa o di comando, non un oggetto fisico appuntito.

concept_definitions.short_definition: The highest or leading position in a ranking, group, or structure.
concept_definitions.usage_note: This covers the leading or highest position sense only.

concept_definitions.short_definition: So formuliert oder gesagt, dass es scharf, verletzend oder unangenehm wirkt.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Hier nur die übertragene Bedeutung für Bemerkungen, Kritik oder Tonfall, nicht die physische Form.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Detto di parole, osservazioni o tono che risultano duri, pungenti o facilmente offensivi.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Qui solo il valore figurato riferito al modo di parlare o criticare.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Said of remarks or tone that sound sharp, biting, or hurtful.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Only the figurative remark or tone sense is modeled here, not the physical pointed-shape sense.

concept_definitions.short_definition: So unheimlich oder schaurig, dass es ein unangenehmes Angstgefühl auslöst.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Typisch für Orte, Geschichten, Geräusche oder Situationen mit düsterer Atmosphäre.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Che mette a disagio o fa provare una paura sottile e strana.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Tipico per luoghi, storie, rumori o situazioni con un'atmosfera cupa.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Strange and unsettling in a way that makes you feel slightly frightened.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Typical for places, stories, sounds, or situations with a dark atmosphere.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Etwas als Idee oder Möglichkeit anbieten.
To put forward an idea or option for consideration.
Avanzare un'idea o un'opzione per la considerazione altrui.
Eine gelernte oder angeborene Kompetenz.

antonym_policy_json.reason: Noun with no single-word lexical antonym at this level

concept_definitions.short_definition: A skill or capacity to do something well.

antonym_policy_json.reason: Noun with no single-word lexical antonym at this level

concept_definitions.short_definition: Un'abilità o competenza acquisita o innata.

antonym_policy_json.reason: Noun with no single-word lexical antonym at this level

concept_definitions.short_definition: Alles zusammen betrachtet oder in der Summe.

concept_definitions.short_definition: Introduce una contraddizione o una correzione rispetto a quanto appena detto o assunto.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Il tedesco 'doch' in funzione di contraddizione non ha un equivalente diretto in italiano. 'Eppure' e 'invece' rendono il senso correttivo, ma spesso il contrasto è espresso anche dall'intonazione.

antonym_policy_json.reason: German modal particle - has no standard lexical antonym across the modeled languages

concept_definitions.short_definition: Contradicts or corrects what has just been said, asserting one's own view as correct.
concept_definitions.usage_note: German 'doch' as a contradiction particle has no single-word equivalent in English. 'But' or 'actually' carry part of the meaning, but the contradiction is often expressed through sentence structure and intonation rather than a single word.

antonym_policy_json.reason: German modal particle - has no standard lexical antonym across the modeled languages

concept_definitions.short_definition: Mildert eine Aufforderung oder ermutigt jemanden, etwas zu tun.

antonym_policy_json.reason: German modal particle - has no standard lexical antonym across the modeled languages

concept_definitions.short_definition: Incoraggia qualcuno o addolcisce un invito o un imperativo.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Il tedesco 'doch' in funzione di incoraggiamento non ha un equivalente particellare in italiano. 'Dai' o 'su' rendono lo spirito di invito morbido, ma sono espressioni e non particelle.

antonym_policy_json.reason: German modal particle - has no standard lexical antonym across the modeled languages

concept_definitions.short_definition: Softens a request or encourages someone to do something.
concept_definitions.usage_note: German 'doch' as an encouragement particle has no single-word equivalent in English. 'Go ahead' or 'just' approximate the encouraging tone but are not grammatical particles.

antonym_policy_json.reason: German modal particle - has no standard lexical antonym across the modeled languages

concept_definitions.short_definition: Macht eine Bitte oder Aufforderung freundlicher und weniger direkt.

antonym_policy_json.reason: German modal particle - has no standard lexical antonym across the modeled languages

concept_definitions.short_definition: Addolcisce una richiesta, indicando che il gesto richiesto è piccolo o veloce.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Il tedesco 'mal' come particella di addolcimento non ha un equivalente diretto in italiano. 'Un attimo' cattura l'idea di una richiesta piccola e non impegnativa. In contesti diversi si può anche usare il condizionale o un 'per favore'.

antonym_policy_json.reason: German modal particle - has no standard lexical antonym across the modeled languages

concept_definitions.short_definition: Softens a request or instruction, making it sound smaller and less demanding.
concept_definitions.usage_note: German 'mal' as a softening particle is most closely rendered in English by 'just', which reduces the perceived weight of a request. Unlike German 'mal', English 'just' is not a grammatical particle.

antonym_policy_json.reason: German modal particle - has no standard lexical antonym across the modeled languages

concept_definitions.short_definition: Drückt eine resignierte Akzeptanz aus, dass etwas einfach so ist, wie es ist.

antonym_policy_json.reason: German modal particle - has no standard lexical antonym across the modeled languages

concept_definitions.short_definition: Esprime una rassegnazione o accettazione di qualcosa che non si può cambiare.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Il tedesco 'halt' e 'eben' in senso fatalista non hanno un equivalente particellare in italiano. 'È così' o 'purtroppo' esprimono l'accettazione rassegnata, ma non sono particelle grammaticali.

antonym_policy_json.reason: German modal particle - has no standard lexical antonym across the modeled languages

concept_definitions.short_definition: Expresses resigned acceptance that something is simply the way it is and cannot be changed.
concept_definitions.usage_note: German 'halt' and 'eben' in their fatalistic sense have no grammatical equivalent in English. The pragmatic meaning is most naturally expressed through phrases like 'that's just how it is' or 'it is what it is'.

antonym_policy_json.reason: German modal particle - has no standard lexical antonym across the modeled languages

concept_definitions.short_definition: Signalisiert, dass der Sprecher etwas als bekannte oder gemeinsam geteilte Information behandelt.

antonym_policy_json.reason: German modal particle - has no standard lexical antonym across the modeled languages

concept_definitions.short_definition: Indica che il parlante considera qualcosa come un'informazione condivisa o già nota all'interlocutore.
concept_definitions.usage_note: Il tedesco 'ja' in funzione di conoscenza condivisa non ha un equivalente particellare in italiano. 'Certo' o 'dopotutto' si avvicinano all'idea, ma in italiano spesso si usa la struttura 'come sai' o l'intonazione.

antonym_policy_json.reason: German modal particle - has no standard lexical antonym across the modeled languages

concept_definitions.short_definition: Signals that the speaker treats something as shared or already known information.
concept_definitions.usage_note: German 'ja' as a shared-knowledge marker has no single grammatical equivalent in English. 'You know' or 'after all' carry a similar pragmatic signal but are not particles.
